data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: All user data is encrypted in transit.

data.title: Two-factor Authentication
data.description: Provides extra security for user logins.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular audits to identify and fix vulnerabilities.

data.title: User Account Protection
data.description: Protects user accounts from unauthorized access.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: Incentivizes security researchers to find vulnerabilities.
